name: Advanced Emulation
description: Behavioural eye emulation: natural blink rhythms, saccades, emotional state from mic activity, and head-droop sleep detection — all without dedicated tracking hardware.
author: VRCFaceTracking
usageInstructions: All features are off by default. Open module settings to toggle on blink rhythm, saccades, emotional state inference, etc. Mic-driven features need a microphone selected in the dropdown.
